items.toString: This work item relates to PDT-2553

fields.summary: BACKEND - Sending single email to multiple recipients

content.text: When Phoenix must notify more than one recipient for the same communication, the system should create and send one email with all recipients on that message—not a separate email per recipient.
Today, multiple recipients can result in duplicate outbound emails for the same event.

fields.summary: When send email to more than one recipient, to send one email with multiple recipients not many separate emails

status.description: This status is managed internally by Jira Software
status.name: Testing
